queries: recursive pairwise anchor token fusion hierarchical context compression LLM log depth 2025 2026
tree-structured hierarchical token aggregation cross-attention referent preservation transformer

raw_responses.title: Recursive Language Models (2025/12)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: RLM uses persistent Python REPL to recursively sub-call LLMs on chunked input; recursive context-management for very long inputs.

raw_responses.title: Autoencoding-Free Context Compression via Contextual Semantic Anchors (2025/10)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: directly selects anchor tokens from original context + aggregates context into their K-V via anchor-attention; SINGLE-STAGE anchor compression.

raw_responses.title: Recursive Language Models 2026 paradigm
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: hierarchical recursive task partitioning; LCM (Lossless Context Management) uses summary DAG with lossless pointers.

raw_responses.title: Tree-Structured Attention with Hierarchical Accumulation (ICLR 2020)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: parse-tree based hierarchical accumulation; nonterminal values accumulated from descendants via 3-stage process.

raw_responses.title: AdmTree Adaptive Semantic Trees (2025)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: hierarchical gist-token summarization; sub-segments + preceding gist tokens; effectively tree-structured compression.

raw_responses.title: Context to EDUs Faithful Structured Compression (2026/01)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: EDU-level structured compression with referential integrity (lossless pointer to input context).

raw_responses.title: Hierarchical Resolution Transformers Wavelet-Inspired (2025/09)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: wavelet-style hierarchical resolution attention; log-depth multi-resolution scales.

raw_responses.title: CCF Context Compression Framework (2025/09)
raw_responses.snippet: LLM-side: segment-wise semantic aggregation + KV memory encoding for long sequences.
